title: Create: Blazing Blood
description: Making Tinkers' Construct automation a little nicer by adding renewable recipes for blaze rods and Blazing Blood via Create.
body:
**A very simple mod that adds a create recipe for blaze rods using sticks, some blaze powder, and a bit of lava (simple and sustainable), and a recipe for tinkers' construct Blazing Blood as well using the blaze rods and some more lava.**

I made this to avoid having to build and afk a forge around a blaze spawner to melt netherite. This is a personal project, if you want this in a different version, I probably won't be able to help you.

_Screenshots (Using EMI for recipes, and some other mods unessesary for this one):_

Adds a Charred Stick item, which only serves as a recipe item _(can be used as furnace fuel but probably not worth the lava)_:
![Charred Stick recipe: Heated mixer, stir one stick and one blaze powder per.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64db6a21d683cdd6cd7ad517ea16572d38e7224a.png)

Adds a Red-Hot Stick item, same deal. Is slightly better at being furnace fuel but still not worth it except for its stackability:
![Red-Hot Stick Recipe: Spout-fill one Charred Stick with 125mb Lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e31f59868ad9a819f77da0d16e98b6af6060a88f.png)

Adds a recipe to make blaze rods using the red-hot sticks:
![Blaze Rod recipe: Spout 500mb of lava onto a Red-Hot Stick.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16215b38a46a96f0c0a4e542915c73d99cc7f877.png)

As a bonus, here's a blaze-powder farm I made while sleep-deprived on a Monday night:
![Blaze powder farm with the balancing of a bowling ball on a seesaw.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910e229bc16a63b9bfa1691cc17e77d111570131.jpeg)

Same MIT licence as the source mods because I think that's required. You may use this in your modpacks, as long as it is hosted on modrith and therefor provides the default link back, or explicitly credits and links back to this page in the primary description.
